# Bayshire
## Business Architecture & Transformation

Bayshire helps growing companies organize how they work. We clarify roles, improve processes, connect systems, introduce technology, and build management visibility so the company can operate and grow without everything depending on the owner.

## Key Facts
- Operator-led business architecture and transformation partner
- Based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, serving UAE and GCC
- Founded by Mase Rasti
- Focus: founder-led and investor-backed service businesses
- Method: Diagnose, Design, Build, Scale
- Website: https://bayshirecorp.com

## Important Pages
- Homepage: https://bayshirecorp.com/
- What We Solve: https://bayshirecorp.com/what-we-solve
- Services: https://bayshirecorp.com/services
- Method: https://bayshirecorp.com/method
- Business MRI: https://bayshirecorp.com/business-mri
- Case Studies: https://bayshirecorp.com/case-studies
- Health Check: https://bayshirecorp.com/health-check

- Contact: https://bayshirecorp.com/contact

## Services
- Business Assessment
- Business Architecture
- Process & SOP Design
- Management Systems
- Technology & Automation
- Sales & Marketing Systems
- Implementation & Transformation

## Sectors
- Self-storage
- Moving and logistics
- Construction and contracting
- Multi-location service businesses
- Operationally complex founder-led companies
